transcription.text: A year ago, the editors of Popular Mechanics took home a special car. They drove it all over, in all conditions, and reported every problem they had. Here are all the problems they had to report. It's your choice.

segments.text: A year ago, the editors of Popular Mechanics took home a special car.
They drove it all over, in all conditions, and reported every problem they had.
Here are all the problems they had to report.

metadata.title: 1992 Oldsmobile Eighty Eight LSS Luxury Sports Sedan by General Motors
